'''''Eclipse II''''' was the second [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|''Eclipse''-class dreadnought]]. It was also the second [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Eclipse II'' resembled its predecessor [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']], including its [[Color/Legends|coloration]]. However, certain aspects—like the [[Engine/Legends|engine]] arrays—were redesigned. In addition, a tower was added above the [[Axial superlaser/Legends|axial superlaser]].<ref name="Empire'sEnd">''[[Star Wars: Empire's End]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:Eclipse_II.jpg|thumb|left|150px|''Eclipse II'' jumping into hyperspace]]
The ''Eclipse II'' was developed around the same time as the first ''Eclipse'', in 0 BBY–0 ABY. Unlike the first ''Eclipse'', however, the ''Eclipse II'' was developed directly above [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]. Similar to its sister ship, the ''Eclipse II'' was also delayed in completion due to Palpatine's [[Battle of Endor/Legends|demise]].<ref name="EGW" />

It served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] after the destruction of the first [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']]. The ''Eclipse II'' transported Palpatine to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] world of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], and later become the focal point of the [[Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Onderon]], where the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attempted to capture the Emperor.<ref name="EE2" />

''Eclipse II'' was ultimately [[Destruction of Byss|destroyed]] over [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], after the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] took control of its computer banks and set the ship on a collision course with the [[Galaxy Gun]]. As it crashed into the orbital cannon, a projectile from the Galaxy Gun ejected and was pulled towards the planet below. In the ensuing explosion, both the remnants of the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] and the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] were destroyed.<ref name="EE2" /> Its destruction alongside Byss also resulted in a massive amount of deaths among the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|royal guards]], leaving only a handful left in existence, including [[Kir Kanos]] and [[Carnor Jax]].<ref name="CE3">[[Crimson Empire 3|''Crimson Empire'' 3]]</ref>
